theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

narrative.summary: Jupiter: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 59 / 중기 62 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: UAE Oil Exports Surge to 85% of Pre-War Levels, IEA Says
top_news.summary: Oil exports from the United Arab Emirates in early June recovered to nearly 85% of the country’s pre-Iran war levels — rebounding even before Washington and Tehran inked an interim peace deal as the Gulf nation drew on pipelines, storage and alternate shipping routes, according to a report from the International Energy Agency.

top_news.title: Ship Insurers Set for Major Claims From Iran War, Allianz Says
top_news.summary: The insurance industry is set to face significant claims for ships that were damaged during the Iran war, according to Allianz SE.

top_news.title: China’s Instagram Gets Ready to Go Public
top_news.summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, we look at Xiaohongshu’s push to go public and what it reveals about confidence in China’s tech sector.

top_news.title: MSCI Upgrades Bulgaria to Frontier; Vietnam, Argentina Unchanged
top_news.summary: MSCI Inc. reclassified Bulgaria as a frontier market, while indicating no changes to Argentina’s and Vietnam’s status in its latest review of global stock indexes.

top_news.title: E11EVEN Miami Operating Partner on World Cup Strategy
top_news.summary: Gino LoPinto, who runs the highest grossing nightclub per square foot in the United States explains that the World Cup serves not only as a global sporting event but also as a significant economic catalyst for the hospitality industry. The conversation emphasizes how Miami's nightlife and hospitality sectors are benefiting from the influx of visitors, with the nightclub playing a key role in driving revenue during the tournament. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Isabelle Lee on "The Close." (Sou

top_news.title: China Targets US Rare Earths Firms in Response to Pentagon
top_news.summary: Gracelin Baskaran, director of the critical minerals security program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, said that while the US has made 'unprecedented' moves to invest billions of dollars in rare earths infrastructure to compete with China, it is still a long term process as investment grows and technology gets more advanced.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: NYC Heads to Polls as Mamdani’s Endorsements Divide Democrats
top_news.summary: Zohran Mamdani is gambling that the voters who came out in droves last year to make him New York City’s mayor will help send a group of his allies to Washington.

top_news.title: Pemex and Petrobras to Team Up in Hunt for Mexican Pre-Salt
top_news.summary: The national oil companies of Mexico and Brazil agreed to work together to discover, produce and refine oil as both Latin American energy giants push to expand their reserves.

top_news.title: EM Assets Sink as Strong Dollar, Korea Tech Rout Hit Markets
top_news.summary: Emerging-market assets tumbled across the board on Tuesday as the dollar climbed to its strongest level of the year and a risk-off mood triggered by a steep selloff in South Korean technology shares rippled through global markets.

top_news.title: Morgan Stanley Caps Private Credit Fund After 11.6% Exit Request
top_news.summary: A $7 billion private credit fund run by Morgan Stanley is capping investor withdrawals at 5%, allowing less than half of the redemptions shareholders requested in the second quarter.
